personality: Blunt, weary, darkly humorous. Speaks with resigned authority from years among prisoners.

greetingPool.text: No visitors without the captain's leave. Move along.
These cells hold those who've earned their stay. Don't give me cause to add you.
Keys and patience — that's all this job requires. Mostly patience.

idlePool.text: The prisoner in cell three has been muttering about buried treasure again. They all do.
Damp walls, cold iron, and the sound of chains. You get used to it after a decade or so.
